Honest Auto Repair in Memphis

We fix cars right the first time, with no hidden costs. Serving Memphis drivers since 2012.

Verified Reviews

Get a Free Estimate

What Your Neighbors Have to Say

Read More Reviews →
J
James W.

The team at Apex fixed my squealing brakes on a 2017 F-150. They showed me the worn pads and explained why the rotors needed resurfacing. Final price matched the estimate exactly. My truck stops smoothly now, even pulling a boat out of Shelby Forest.

L
Latasha R.

After my AC quit on I-40 near the stadium exit, Apex diagnosed a failed compressor clutch same-day. They had the part by noon next day and didn't push unnecessary services. Cool air works better than when I bought my Civic used.

C
Carlos M.

My Silverado started slipping gears between Germantown and downtown. Apex found the transmission fluid was burned from towing in summer heat. Fluid change and cooler line flush fixed it for half what the dealer wanted.

D
Diane K.

When my Subaru wouldn't start after that cold snap in January, Apex tested the battery properly instead of just replacing it. Turned out to be a bad starter connection they fixed for minimal cost. Honest work.

Additional Auto Repair Services

Brake Repair AC Repair Transmission Service Suspension Repair

Apex Auto Repair — Certified Professionals

Our team brings certified expertise and years of experience to every auto repair project. We stand behind our work with comprehensive warranties and a commitment to quality.

More About Us →

The Apex Auto Repair Way

Our proven process ensures every project is completed with precision, transparency, and care.

1

Consultation

We start with a thorough, no-obligation assessment. Our certified team evaluates your needs and provides a detailed report with recommendations.

2

Plan & Prepare

We work with you to determine the best approach for your specific auto repair needs. Our experts ensure the right plan for quality results.

3

Get It Done

Our skilled team gets to work with precision and efficiency. We maintain a clean, organized environment and keep you informed every step of the way.

4

Quality Check

Before we consider any job complete, our team performs a comprehensive quality review. We verify every detail meets our exacting standards.

5

Wrap Up

Transparent pricing with no surprises. You only pay when you're 100% satisfied with the work. We offer flexible options to make the process seamless.

Proudly Serving Memphis & Beyond

As a locally owned and operated company, we're proud to serve customers throughout Memphis, TN and the surrounding communities. Our team brings local expertise and dedication to every project.

Memphis Bartlett Germantown Collierville Arlington Lakeland Millington Cordova
Let's Get Started →

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our auto repair services.

How often should Memphis drivers replace brake pads?

Every 30,000-50,000 miles depending on your commute. Downtown stop-and-go traffic wears pads faster than highway driving.

Can you resurface rotors instead of replacing them?

Yes, if they meet minimum thickness specs. We measure precisely before recommending either option.

Built on Memphis Values

Call 555-AUT-R92 for same-day diagnostics. Open Monday-Saturday.

Let's Begin →
